properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 C3 V4 C3 V5 C3 V6 C3 C3 V7

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Lord, I Stand in the midst of a multitude, Of those from every tribe and tongue; We are Your people, redeemed by Your Blood, Rescued from death by Your love.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: There are no words good enough to thank You, There are no words to express my praise; But I will lift up my voice and sing from my heart, With all of my strength.

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: Hallelujah, hallelujah Hallelujah to the Lamb. Hallelujah, hallelujah By the Blood of Christ we stand. Every tongue, every tribe, Every people, every land, Giving glory, giving honor, Giving praise unto the Lamb of God.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Lord, we stand by grace in Your Presence, Cleansed by the Blood of the Lamb; We are Your children called by Your Name, Humbly we bow and we pray.

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Release Your power to work in us and through us, Till we are changed to be more like You; And all the nations will see Your glory revealed, And worship You.

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: Every knee shall bow, Every tongue confess, That You are Lord of all.

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: Giving praise unto the Lamb of God, Giving praise unto the Lamb of God, Jesus Christ, Lamb of God.
